purpose: Seed sources for taste-first link packs. These are starting points, not fixed rules.

lookbook_images.name: Vogue Runway - Menswear
lookbook_images.why: Reliable runway/lookbook image archive with designer context.

lookbook_images.name: Vogue Runway - Lemaire
lookbook_images.why: Quiet uniform, relaxed tailoring, understated styling. Runway archive with full lookbook images.

lookbook_images.name: 032c Magazine
lookbook_images.why: Fashion plus culture, useful for stronger attitude and article references.

lookbook_images.name: Hypebeast Fashion
lookbook_images.why: Lookbook and streetwear drops; needs strict taste filtering.

lookbook_images.name: Highsnobiety Style
lookbook_images.why: Trend and editorial style links; useful but should avoid generic influencer pieces.

lookbook_images.name: BranD Magazine
lookbook_images.why: Hong Kong bilingual design magazine. Strong editorial curation on branding, typography, objects, visual culture. Uses HTTP (no SSL) — web scraper only.

lookbook_images.name: Das Programm — Dieter Rams Archive
lookbook_images.why: Comprehensive Dieter Rams archive: Braun electronics 1955–1995 and Vitsoe furniture. Product images are small (~300px) — uses lowered dimension threshold.

lookbook_images.name: Toshio Saeki — WikiArt Archive
lookbook_images.why: 17 artworks on WikiArt. Japanese ero-guro illustrator (1945–2019). Surreal, dark, traditionally-rooted but modern.

lookbook_images.name: Toshio Saeki Estate
lookbook_images.why: Official estate site. Mostly text/about — primary image source is WikiArt above.

videos.name: SHOWstudio Fashion Film
videos.why: Fashion film archive and submissions, better for wild visual references.

videos.name: SHOWstudio Video
videos.why: Experimental fashion moving image and process references.

videos.name: Dazed Video
videos.why: Youth culture, art, music, fashion video references.

videos.name: Vimeo Staff Picks
videos.why: Useful for cinematic, unusual video language outside fashion.

videos.name: Rams — Gary Hustwit
videos.why: Documentary on Dieter Rams. Design philosophy, object culture, 'less, but better'. Feeds the quiet, functional, timeless taste direction with visual and conceptual depth.

articles.name: SSENSE Editorial
articles.why: Culture and fashion essays with stronger point of view.

articles.name: 032c Magazine
articles.why: Deep fashion/culture interviews and theory-adjacent pieces.

articles.name: Dazed Fashion
articles.why: Fashion culture with attitude; good for article angles.

articles.name: The Guardian Art & Design
articles.why: Architecture/design/culture depth that can feed lifestyle positioning.

articles.name: Vogue Business
articles.why: Fashion industry context, useful for deeper posts and captions.

articles.name: BranD Magazine
articles.why: Bilingual design culture and branding thinking. Uses HTTP. Translates visual taste into conceptual frameworks.

articles.name: Vitsoe — Dieter Rams Philosophy
articles.why: Dieter Rams' Ten Principles of Good Design. Foundation-level taste text: 'less, but better', 'good design is as little design as possible'. Aligns with quiet editorial tone.

articles.name: Toshio Saeki — Selected Works & Essays
articles.why: Deep archive of Saeki's illustrated works 1972–2016 with critical context. Erotic-grotesque tradition meets modern surrealism — useful for understanding visual provocation with restraint.
